hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))") 2>/dev/null; if [[ "$FILE" == *"waldo-ui/src/components"*".tsx" ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *"index.html" ]]; then bash /Users/miguelugalde/Desktop/waldo-design-system/.claude/hooks/verify-component.sh "$FILE"; fi'
